title: Farlight
description: Farlight is an optimized and enhanced version of vanilla, originally forked from Fabulously Optimized
body:
# What is Farlight?
Farlight modpack is the ultimate enhanced version of Minecraft fabric. The mods included create an immersive and engaging experience for everyone! In this modpack you will find an excellent selection of optimization, vanilla-plus, and quality of life mods. So, what are you waiting for? Jump into the world of Farlight and discover a realm of limitless possibilities!

# Credits

Originally forked from Fabulously Optimized https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized

Inspiration from VYKPack https://modrinth.com/modpack/vyk

Logo created using Mine-Imator https://www.mineimator.com/

### Music 

One Bard Band by Alexander Nakarada | https://www.serpentsoundstudios.com
Music promoted by https://www.chosic.com/free-music/all/
Creative Commons CC BY 4.0
https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Fantasy Motion (Loop Ready) by Alexander Nakarada | https://www.serpentsoundstudios.com
Music promoted by https://www.free-stock-music.com
Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)
https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

### Mods

[Naturalist](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naturalist)

[Structory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory)

[Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)

[Effective](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective)

[Jade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade)

[Terralith](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terralith)

[Advancement Plaques](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advancement-plaques)

[Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)

[Incendium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/incendium)

[Nullscape](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nullscape)

### Note

The complete list of credits can be found within the instance folder
